query: Which CDRL deliverables in A001, A009, and A031 have the latest status updates?
document_family: CDRLs — 1.5 enterprise program CDRLS (A001 through A025+, each with dedicated subfolder)
production_rationale: The PM needs structured deliverable status, not just narrative context. Production has numbered CDRL folders with explicit deliverable status signals, including A001, A009, and A031.

query: What schedule milestones and slips are shown in the latest PMR and Integrated Master Schedule?
document_family: Program Management — 6.0 PMR (IGS_PMR_2026_FebR1.pptx, Schedule Performance, SubK Slides) + CDRL A031 Integrated Master Schedule
production_rationale: This is a narrative briefing question about schedule health. Production has PMR presentations and IMS artifacts that support the PM's milestone review workflow.

query: How do the current FEP actuals compare to the funding plan and LDI burn-rate by OY3?
document_family: Program Management — 1.0 FEP (enterprise program FEP w_DMEA_OY3, ITD Actuals, CEAC) + LDI budget/hours spreadsheets
production_rationale: This is a structured cost-tracking question. Production has FEP and LDI spreadsheets with actuals, plan, and burn-rate fields that map to the PM's daily budget view.

query: What is the latest PMR briefing file name for the enterprise program program?
document_family: Program Management — 6.0 PMR (2022-2026 folders, Schedule Performance, SubK Slides)
production_rationale: This is a direct entity lookup for the current briefing artifact. Production contains the named PMR presentation file in the PMR folder tree.

query: What staffing, suborganization, and budget risks are flagged across the latest PM brief and variance reports?
document_family: Program Management — #Follow-On materials + 6.0 PMR/SubK Slides + 2.0 Weekly Variance Reports + 1.0 FEP
production_rationale: This is a multi-part PM question that requires decomposing the staffing, suborganization, and budget angles before synthesizing them into one answer.

query: What purchase orders are currently open and which vendors or CLINs are still outstanding?
document_family: Logistics / Procurement — 5.0 Logistics/Procurement/001 - Open Purchases (iBuy GL lists with CLIN, Vendor, PO# columns)
production_rationale: This is a classic structured PO-status lookup. Production has procurement spreadsheets with open-purchase, vendor, and CLIN fields.

query: Which site is named on the latest hand-carry packing list?
document_family: Logistics / Shipments — 5.0 Logistics/Shipments (Hand Carry Packing List, NG Packing List Template, Shipping Request forms)
production_rationale: This is a direct site lookup from shipping paperwork. Production includes real OCONUS packing documents with site names in the shipment records.

query: What parts are on the recommended spares list and what are their part numbers, quantities, and OEMs?
document_family: Logistics / Parts — 5.0 Logistics/Parts (Downloaded Information)/Recommended Spares Parts List .xlsx
production_rationale: This is table-style inventory retrieval from a spreadsheet. Production has a real spares list with part numbers, quantities, OEMs, and sub-system fields.

query: Which equipment is due for calibration next, and what do the calibration audit folders show?
document_family: Logistics / Calibration — 5.0 Logistics/Calibration (yearly folders 2022-2025, Material and Testing Equipment Calibration.pdf)
production_rationale: This is a narrative operational question about calibration timing and audit evidence. Production has yearly calibration folders and a calibration reference PDF.

query: Which OCONUS shipments also required customs or export-control paperwork, and what did they contain?
document_family: Logistics / Shipments + Disposition + EEMS + DD250 records
production_rationale: This is a multi-part logistics question spanning shipment content and compliance paperwork. Production has customs, disposition, and export-control artifacts that need to be combined.

query: What parts have the highest failure rates across all sites based on the Part Failure Tracker and corrective action folders?
document_family: Asset Mgmt — Part Failure Tracker.xlsx + CDRL A001 CAP folders + A001 Failure Summary & Analysis Report DID
production_rationale: This is a cross-site counting/trending query. Production has a real Part Failure Tracker and corrective-action folders that support failure-rate aggregation.

query: What Maintenance Service Reports have been filed across all monitoring system sites, and what maintenance actions and part replacements do they document?
document_family: CDRL A002 — Maintenance Service Report (MSR) — site-specific subfolders
production_rationale: This is an aggregate retrieval over many site reports. Production has many real MSR folders, so the question should summarize actions across multiple maintenance records.

query: What site outages have been caused by power failures, UPS issues, or environmental damage, and what were the return-to-service procedures?
document_family: Systems Engineering — 3_Site Outages Analysis + 4_Site Issues/Fairford + UPS and power-repair artifacts
production_rationale: This is a narrative failure-analysis question. Production has outage analysis and power-repair documents that support return-to-service guidance.

query: Which site is associated with the latest Awase Okinawa installation package?
document_family: Site Visits — Awase (Okinawa JP) install folders + CDRL A006/A007 installation test artifacts
production_rationale: This is a direct site lookup tied to an installation package. Production has a named Awase/Okinawa install set and matching test documentation.

query: What installation acceptance tests were performed at the Awase Okinawa install, and what does the Site Installation Plan say about the phases?
document_family: Site Visits — Awase install folders + CDRL A003 Site Installation Plan + A006/A007 acceptance test artifacts
production_rationale: This is a multi-part engineering question that requires combining a site-visit record with installation-plan and test-report content.

_comment: === PERSONA 4: NETWORK ADMIN / CYBERSECURITY (PQ-016 through PQ-020) ===
query: What ACAS scan results, SCAP scan results, and STIG review findings are documented for legacy monitoring system and monitoring system systems?
document_family: Cybersecurity — A027 DAA Accreditation Support Data + 111023_STIG_Review.xlsx + CT&E-ST&E folders
production_rationale: This is a narrative compliance question about scan results and STIG findings. Production has dedicated cybersecurity artifacts for these reviews.

query: What system name is listed on the latest RMF Security Plan?
document_family: Cybersecurity — A027 RMF Security Plan / Security Authorization Package / System Authorization Boundary
production_rationale: This is a direct entity lookup for the named system in the RMF package. Production contains a dedicated RMF security-plan artifact with the system name.

query: What security events and cyber incidents have been documented, including the Fairford Russian event and the Alpena PPTP buffer overflow?
document_family: Cybersecurity / ISSO / Security Events (2017-05-03 Eielson IP Conflict, 2017-05-25 monitoring system Port Scan, 2017-08-11 Alpena PPTP Buffer Overflow, 2019-03-27 Russian Fairford)
production_rationale: This is incident-review narrative retrieval. Production has real cybersecurity event writeups with named sites and concrete attack vectors.

query: What ATO re-authorization packages have been submitted and what system changes triggered them?
document_family: Cybersecurity / ATO-ATC Package Changes (18+ packages) + A027 authorization package artifacts
production_rationale: This is a structured package-status lookup across authorization artifacts. Production has multiple ATO change packages with clear package metadata.

query: What monthly continuous monitoring audit results are documented for 2024, and what cybersecurity directives are active?
document_family: Cybersecurity — ISSO/Continuous_Monitoring/Monthly Audits-Archive/2024 + directives for Log4j, Wanna-Cry, and SPARTAN VIPER
production_rationale: This is a multi-part cyber operations question that combines audit results with active directive tracking. Production has both monthly monitoring archives and directive artifacts.

query: How many monitoring system and legacy monitoring system sites are there, where are they located, and which ones have had installations or maintenance visits in the last three years?
document_family: Cross-family — monitoring system Sites/1_Sites + legacy monitoring system sites + Site Visits + MSR folders
production_rationale: This is a cross-folder site-count and visit-history question. Production has enough site folders and visit records to support enumeration across the corpus.

query: Which sites have had Corrective Action Plans filed, what incident numbers and failure types were involved, and what parts were consumed?
document_family: Cross-family — A001 CAP folders + Part Failure Tracker + MSRs + spares lists
production_rationale: This is a multi-part cross-role synthesis problem. It requires combining failure analysis, corrective actions, and parts consumption across multiple document families.

query: How many open purchase orders exist across all procurement records, what parts have been received versus outstanding, and what is the total CLIN coverage?
document_family: Cross-family — Procurement open/received folders + iBuy GL lists + A014 Priced Bill of Materials
production_rationale: This is a structured cross-document procurement count. Production has open/received purchase records and CLIN-bearing spreadsheets that support table-style aggregation.

query: Summarize all shipment activity, parts disposition, and calibration actions across fiscal years 2022 through 2026.
document_family: Cross-family — Shipments year folders + Disposition year folders + Calibration year folders + AssetSmart snapshots
production_rationale: This is a multi-year cross-document summarization problem. Production has shipment, disposition, and calibration records spanning multiple years.

query: Give me a cross-program risk summary: what CDRLs are overdue, what ATO packages are pending, what cybersecurity directives remain active, and what parts have recurring failures?
document_family: Cross-family — CDRLs + ATO-ATC packages + directives + Part Failure Tracker + PMR + FEP
production_rationale: This is the broadest demo-style cross-role synthesis query. It pulls together PM, logistics, cyber, and field-engineering risk signals into one answer.
